WITH toDateTime('2024-01-01 00:00:00') AS date_time SELECT addNanoseconds(date_time, 500) AS result_nanos;
WITH '2024-01-01 00:00:00' AS date_time_string SELECT addNanoseconds(date_time_string, 2000) AS result_nanos_string;
WITH (SELECT addNanoseconds(date_time, 1000000000) FROM test_dates) AS nested_nanos SELECT nested_nanos;
SELECT addNanoseconds(d.date_time, 1000) AS adjusted_time FROM (SELECT toDateTime('2024-01-01 00:00:00') AS date_time) AS d;
SELECT addNanoseconds(d1.date_time, d2.additional_time) FROM test_dates d1 JOIN additional_dates d2 ON d1.date_time < d2.additional_time;
WITH (SELECT addNanoseconds(date_time, 10000) FROM (SELECT toDateTime('2024-01-01 00:00:00') AS date_time)) AS nanoseconds_result SELECT * FROM nanoseconds_result;
SELECT addNanoseconds(date_time, -2000) AS decrease_time FROM test_dates;
WITH 9223372036854775807 AS max_nanos, toDateTime('2024-01-01 00:00:00') AS base_time SELECT addNanoseconds(base_time, max_nanos) AS overflow_test;
WITH '2024-01-01 00:00:00' AS date_time_string, 0 AS zero_nanos SELECT addNanoseconds(date_time_string, zero_nanos) AS same_time;
WITH (SELECT addNanoseconds(date_time, 1) FROM (SELECT toDateTime('2024-01-01 22:00:00') AS date_time)) AS incremented_time SELECT * FROM incremented_time;
